items.title: Tesla reveals two Robotaxi crashes involving teleoperators
items.summary: Newly un-redacted crash reports reveal some of the troubles Tesla has had as it tries to scale its robotaxis.
items.whyItMatters: Technology updates can influence strategy, risk, and the speed of change across digital products.

items.title: Greg Brockman Officially Takes Control of OpenAI’s Products in Latest Shakeup
items.summary: OpenAI is once again reorganizing its executive ranks as part of its effort to unify ChatGPT and Codex into one core product experience.
